ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "hotel_type" TEXT /* Type of the hotel (e.g., Resort, Budget) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hotel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding the hotel */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the hotel (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agent */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the agent works for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the guest */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Loyalty status of the guest (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of the room (e.g., Single, Double, Suite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the room */,
  "price_per_night" REAL /* Price per night for the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_plans" (
  "meal_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal plan */,
  "meal_plan" TEXT /* Type of meal plan (e.g., BB for Bed and Breakfast) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meal plan */,
  "price_per_day" REAL /* Price per day for the meal plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_types" (
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer type */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Name of the customer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special request */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation associated with the special request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of special request (e.g., Extra towels, Early check-in) */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the special request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel the employee works at */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., Receptionist, Housekeeper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_employees_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)
